description: Set up the environment and verify baseline tests pass before making documentation changes.
steps: Install dependencies: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install boto3 botocore
Run the full test suite: NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -q
Validate CDK synthesis: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet
Create a feature branch: git checkout -b docs/readme-enrichment-meta-prompts
acceptance_criteria: CDK synth succeeds for dev environment
Feature branch docs/readme-enrichment-meta-prompts is created and checked out
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -q shows all tests passing
NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet exits without error
findings: All 298 tests pass. CDK synth succeeds with deprecation warning about pointInTimeRecovery (non-blocking). Python 3.9 runtime detected (boto3 deprecation warning for 3.9 after April 2026). Feature branch docs/readme-enrichment-meta-prompts created from main at commit 5b2625a.
